mapper.insert: insert into chapters(article_id, chapter_index, title, word_count, display_order) values (#{articleId}, #{chapterIndex}, #{chapterTitle}, #{wordCount}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.select: select c.id as chapterId, c.title as chapterTitle from chapters c inner join articles a on a.id = c.article_id where c.id = #{chapterId} and a.is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.id AS chapterId, c.article_id AS articleId, c.chapter_index AS chapterIndex, c.title AS chapterTitle, c.word_count AS wordCount, c.status AS status, c.source_url AS sourceUrl, c.display_order AS displayOrder, c.is_paragraphs_complete AS isParagraphsComplete, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime FROM chapters c INNER JOIN articles a ON a.id = c.article_id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.display_order ASC, c.chapter_index ASC

SELECT c.id AS chapterId, c.article_id AS articleId, c.chapter_index AS chapterIndex, p.id AS paragraphId, p.paragraph_index AS paragraphIndex, p.content AS content FROM chapters c INNER JOIN articles a ON a.id = c.article_id INNER JOIN paragraphs p ON p.chapter_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{chapterId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.paragraph_index ASC
